rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.0151, which governs school district policies for students with food allergies at risk for anaphylaxis.
quote: The board of trustees of each school district and the governing body or an appropriate officer of each open-enrollment charter school shall adopt and administer a policy for the care of students with a diagnosed food allergy at risk for anaphylaxis
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this anaphylaxis policy statute.
